skills.description: Add two integers and return their sum.
Return all notes stored for a single user. Call when you need the complete note history for one specific user.
Search all users' notes for lines containing a query string. Call when you don't know which user's notes contain the answer.
skills.output: object mapping user_id to matching notes

skills.description: Append a new note for a user and confirm success. Call to persist information tied to a specific user.
Fetch a user record by ID. Returns a typed Result with ok/value or ok/error_kind on failure.
skills.output: object with ok, value, error, error_kind fields

skills.description: Map an HTTP status code to a typed error taxonomy constant (AUTH_EXPIRED, RATE_LIMIT, NOT_FOUND, TRANSIENT).
